title: strychnos beddomei var. coriacea
intro: Strychnos beddomei var. coriacea is a plant species, commonly known as the Beddome's Strychnine Tree or Indian Nux Vomica. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Strychnos beddomei var. coriacea include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help reduce pain and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into powders, extracts, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
